name: hidden-attractors-fo

affiliation.name: Instituto Nacional de Astrofisica, Optica y Electronica (INAOE)

contributor.description: Doctoral thesis director; assigned and guided the research topic.
Doctoral thesis co-advisor; reviewed the theoretical fractional-calculus component.
Provided source code used as provenance for the EFORK implementation and integer-order Lyapunov algorithm.

description: Numerical workflows for locating, reproducing, auditing, and conservatively classifying hidden-attractor candidates in Chua/Lur'e systems with integer and commensurate Caputo fractional order.
